title: Chat
agent_unavailable: This Agent is unavailable. History remains readable, but no new messages can be sent.
generation_in_progress: Generation in progress. Wait for it to finish before making another change.
no_agents: No Agents are available for a new conversation.

attachments.loadFailed: Draft attachments could not be loaded.
attachments.tooMany: You can attach at most {{count}} files to one message.
attachments.uploadFailed: The file could not be uploaded.
attachments.removeFailed: The draft attachment could not be removed.
attachments.readFailed: The attachment could not be opened.

errors.load: The chat could not be loaded.
errors.options_load: Agent or model options could not be refreshed. Existing history is still available.
errors.send: The message could not be sent.
errors.model_update: The conversation model could not be changed.
errors.agent_required: The message could not be sent.
errors.agent_locked: The Agent cannot be changed after a conversation starts.
errors.context_too_large: The conversation is too large for the selected model.
errors.conversation_not_found: The conversation could not be found.
errors.generation_in_progress: A response is already being generated.
errors.message_not_found: The failed message could not be found.
errors.model_override_not_allowed: Change the conversation model before sending.
errors.provider_invalid_response: The model returned an invalid response.
errors.upload_type_invalid: This file type is not supported.
errors.upload_too_large: The file exceeds the upload size limit.
errors.extraction_invalid: The file could not be parsed.
errors.extraction_empty: The file does not contain readable content.
errors.extraction_too_large: The extracted file content exceeds the size limit.
errors.extraction_unsupported: This file type cannot be parsed.
errors.attachment_not_found: The attachment could not be found.
errors.attachment_not_ready: The attachment is no longer an unbound draft.
